slides.title: The Factory 🏭
slides.content:
Think of a `Class` as a blueprint for a car. 

An `Object` is the actual physical car built from that blueprint. In apps, users, buttons, and enemies are all Objects!

slides.title: Creating a Class

quizData.question: If a Class is the Blueprint, what is the Object?
quizData.explanation: The Object is the concrete instance created from your Class blueprint.
